channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Poll: Most Americans feel summer blues over Trump and the economy
item.description: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll shows a record low approval for President Trump's job performance and economic handling.

item.title: Jet fuel prices drop, but airfares may not follow soon
item.description: Jet fuel prices have hit their lowest since the Iran war began, but aviation experts say airfare costs remain high.

item.title: As the U.S. turns 250, a museum makes history tangible
item.description: Federal law mandates accessibility for most museums, but access to exhibits often remains limited.

item.title: What and who will be at the Great American State Fair? A primer
item.description: Several state governments have declined to join the 16-day event, though organizers say all U.S. states and territories will be represented.
